## Validation

- [ ] Module manifest validated
- [ ] PSScriptAnalyzer passed
- [ ] Pester tests passed
- [ ] Windows PowerShell 5.1 considered
- [ ] Sample output reviewed
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Changelog updated

## Safety review

- [ ] Diagnostic behavior remains read-only
- [ ] No sensitive evidence included
- [ ] Errors are handled without terminating unrelated plugins
- [ ] Recommendations are evidence-based
- [ ] Rollback or compatibility notes included where applicable

## Evidence

Add test output, screenshots, sample reports, or CI links.
